Serving 50,000+ students across Nigeria

Your Complete
University Portal

The all-in-one academic management platform for Nigerian universities. Register courses, view grades, pay fees, and access services — all in one place.

Support

Everything You Need

A complete suite of academic tools designed for Nigerian universities

Course Registration

Register for courses, view prerequisites, and manage your academic load online.

Academic Records

Access your transcripts, grades, CGPA, and degree audit reports instantly.

Fee Payments

Pay school fees, hostel, and other charges securely via Remita, Paystack, or bank transfer.

Academic Calendar

Stay updated with exam timetables, lectures, and academic events.

Certificates

Request and download verified digital certificates and transcripts.

Student Services

Hostel applications, SIWES clearance, and departmental clearance.
